title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
